title: Maltorran
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Maltorrans''' were a stocky alien race from the [[Maltorra system/Legends|Maltorra system]]. They were distinguished by their oddly-jointed limbs.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''
